name: conversor-iae-cnae
description: The first fiscal MCP server for Spain. Live IAE, CNAE 2025, AEAT tax-form and RETA data for AI agents — official sources, no scrapers.
description_es: El primer servidor MCP fiscal de España. Códigos IAE, CNAE 2025, obligaciones AEAT y cuota RETA para agentes de IA, con datos oficiales.

authentication.premium: Bearer cvr_ API key (plan Profesional+) or claude.ai OAuth connector

tools.name: buscar_codigo
tools.description: Semantic search across IAE / CNAE 2025 / CNAE 2009 by description.

tools.name: detalle_iae
tools.description: Full record for an IAE code and its associated CNAE codes.

tools.name: detalle_cnae
tools.description: Full record for a CNAE 2025 code and its associated IAE codes.

tools.name: detalle_cnae_2009
tools.description: A legacy CNAE 2009 code and its CNAE 2025 correspondence.

tools.name: calendario_fiscal
tools.description: AEAT forms and upcoming deadlines for a code.

tools.name: describe_conversor
tools.description: Self-description: catalogs, RPCs and data freshness.

tools.name: obligaciones_fiscales
tools.description: Applicable AEAT forms with confidence, reason, frequency and deadline.

tools.name: modulos_irpf_iva
tools.description: Estimación objetiva (módulos) régimen for an IAE code.

tools.name: consulta_masiva
tools.description: Up to 50 IAE or CNAE records in a single call.

tools.name: cuota_reta
tools.description: 2026 RETA bracket and minimum quota from net income.
